case_number: criminal bail application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.48 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application -------------------------------------------- 26.02.2025 Mr. Liaquat Ali Khan, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant after arguing the bail application at some length does not press the same and seeks direction to the trial Court to record statement of complainant, preferably within a period of two months. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded no objection for such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed, however, learned trial Court is directed to record the statement of complainant, preferably within a period of two months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
